meaning: n.麻絮,填絮(用于填塞船缝)
examples: To make(a boat) watertight by packing seams with a waterproof material, such as oakum or pitch.
He smelled the tar and oakum of the deck as he slept and he smelled the smell o Africa that the land breeze brought at morning.
Operation Oakum was launched on 26 February and ran for a week.
